categories.label: HTML Direction
categories.description: Presence and correctness of dir="rtl" and lang="ar" attributes

categories.label: CSS Logical Properties
categories.description: Use of CSS logical properties instead of physical directional properties

categories.label: Arabic Typography
categories.description: Letter-spacing, line-height, text decoration, and font rendering for Arabic text

categories.label: Layout Mirroring
categories.description: Navigation order, sidebar position, and icon mirroring for RTL

categories.label: Mobile RTL
categories.description: RTL rendering correctness on mobile viewport (375×812)

categories.label: BiDi Handling
categories.description: Correct handling of mixed Arabic and Latin content, bdi tags, form inputs

categories.label: Text Overflow
categories.description: Detection of clipped or overflowing Arabic text in UI elements

categories.label: Font Fallback
categories.description: Arabic-capable font in font-family stack and successful font loading
categories.note: Font fallback issues are penalised within the typography category score
